## Summary

- Describe the change in implementation terms.

## Validation

- [ ] `mvn -B -DskipTests package`
- [ ] `mvn -B test` (or explain why not applicable)
- [ ] Rising World API usage verified against `libs/PluginAPI.jar`
- [ ] Runtime smoke test considered

## Release Safety

- [ ] Tag/release workflow impact checked
- [ ] Artifact names and packaging remain expected
- [ ] README updated if behavior/install/usage changed
- [ ] HISTORY updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Commit title follows Conventional Commits

## Notes

- Risks, follow-ups, or explicitly skipped checks.
